heading: Acquisition and operation of space systems for space warfighting and control
label: 2275d Acquisition and operation of space systems for space warfighting and control

children.heading: .—Requirement
children.label: a .—Requirement
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall acquire and operate space systems to be used primarily for space warfighting and control to meet the requirements specified by one or more combatant commanders in carrying out the responsibilities set forth in .section 164 of this title

children.heading: .—Role of Commercial Space Systems
children.label: b .—Role of Commercial Space Systems
children.text: The Secretary may use one or more commercial space systems to augment the space systems acquired and operated under subsection (a) if such commercial space systems are under the direction of a member of the armed forces with responsibility for space warfighting and control operations.
The Secretary may waive the application of subsection (a) if the Secretary determines that such a waiver is in the national security interest of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: a description of the national security interest upon which the exercise of such authority is based;

children.label: B
children.text: the anticipated vulnerabilities to national security posed by the use of such waiver;

children.label: C
children.text: identification of which operational commander will provide direction to the commercial space system that is used pursuant to the waiver instead of a system acquired and operated by the Secretary; and

children.label: D
children.text: the anticipated duration of such waiver.
